top_signals.title: Ukraine hits vital oil refinery more than 2,500km behind Russian border
top_signals.summary: While Russia continues to pound Ukraine with missiles and drones, killing at least 19 people and injuring dozens more in Kyiv, Ukraine is striking deep inside Russian territory as part of a campaign to degrade the Kremlin’s war machine. Ukrainian forces carried out a drone strike on an oil refinery in the Russian city of ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Qatar condemns Iran over tanker attack near Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Qatar’s foreign ministry called an attack on the Qatari tanker Al Rekayyat near the Strait of Hormuz an unacceptable threat to international navigation and global energy supplies on Tuesday. Foreign ministry spokesperson Majed Al Ansari said the incident violated international law and demanded Iran stop all actions that threaten regional security and maritime safety. Al ...

top_signals.title: Chip stocks sell off after Samsung earnings fall short of high AI bar

top_signals.summary: US president revives calls for his country to take over Greenland

top_signals.title: Supreme Court's Kagan, Barrett to testify to House for budget request, a first since 2019
top_signals.summary: Supreme Court justices last testified to Congress was 2019, when Elena Kagan and Samuel Alito discussed a budget request with a House subcommittee.

top_signals.title: Monjasa’s bunker barge resumes US Gulf operations after drydocking
top_signals.summary: Bunker supplier Monjasa’s bunker barge Monjasa Thunder has returned to service following its first-ever drydocking in the Bahamas. Drydocking involves taking a vessel out of the water for planned inspections, maintenance, repairs and upgrades. The barge successfully completed its intermediate and docking surveys at Grand Bahama Shipyard in Freeport and has resumed operations in the ...

top_signals.title: Services production up by 0.7% in the euro area and by 0.3% in the EU
top_signals.summary: Overview In April 2026, compared with March 2026, seasonally adjusted services production increased by 0.7% in the euro area and by 0.3% in the EU, according to first estimates from Eurostat, the statistical office of the European Union. In March 2026, services production grew by 0.1% in the euro area and by 0.4% in the ...
